title: Upsell Without Losing The Sale: A Quick Guide For Startups
author: Caylin White, Jeffrey Steen

classification.rationale: Rule-based: problem_solving intent detected in 'Key Takeaways'. Products: einstein_ai, sales_cloud, service_cloud, marketing_cloud. Funnel: consideration.

existing_cta.heading: Boost sales with a CRM made for growing businesses
existing_cta.body: Try Starter Suite for free to close more deals and win more customers, today.

existing_cta_score.rationale: CTA targets decision-stage readers; section is consideration-stage. Product alignment: match.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Introduction — let the reader engage with the content before presenting a CTA.

classification.rationale: Rule-based: learning intent detected in 'Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)'. Products: sales_cloud, starter. Funnel: awareness.

cta_health_issues: CTAs are only at the top. Move at least one to mid-article or conclusion where readers are most engaged.
No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
Evaluation content with no product-focused CTA. Readers comparing solutions expect demos, comparisons, or trials.
